title: more image binding tests
body:
add two additional bindings tests for image usage.

add ability to use search filter on the endpoint.

Signed-off-by: Brent Baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: You did a lot more then your comment indicates.  IE Fixed filtering.  Could you update your comment to indicate what was fixed.
